name: Cold Chocolate Cheese Cake
recipeInstructions:
Crust:
1. Melt the butter.
2. Mix the biscuit crumbs with sugar and cocoa powder.
3. Add the melted butter to the mixture.
4. Stir until well combined.
5. Press the mixture into a 26 cm spring form pan.
6. Refrigerate.
Filling:
1. Melt chocolate in a double boiler or microwave.
2. Stir until smooth.
3. Remove from heat.
4. Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form; set aside.
5. Whip cream until soft peaks form; set aside.
6. Whisk egg yolks with sugar until fluffy.
7. Whip cream cheese until fluffy, then add the egg yolk mixture and chocolate.
8. Stir until fully combined.
9. Fold in cream until combined.
10. Finally, fold in egg whites until combined.
11. Pour the mixture over the crust.
12. Sprinkle pecan nuts on top.
13. Cover and refrigerate for at least 6 hours, preferably overnight.
